headline: Fertilizer Maker To Report, Stock Soars On Hormuz Closure
summary: Fertilizer producer CF Industries rose 30% in March when Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz, which led to a global supply shortage.

headline: CF Industries beats quarterly profit estimates on strong nitrogen demand
summary: U.S. fertilizer company CF Industriesbeat core profit estimates for the first quarter onWednesday, as strong nitrogen demand and higher prices helpedoffset higher natural gas-driven production...
